product_overview: DataSage is a web app for uploading CSV files and receiving automated data analysis, charts, AI insights, and downloadable reports. Authenticated users can review past analyses, open detailed dashboards, and interact with dataset-specific Q&A.
core_goals: Create an account and sign in to access analysis features
Upload a CSV file to start automated data analysis
Review analysis results through dashboards with charts, insights, and forecasting
Ask questions about the dataset in a chat interface
Browse, reopen, rename, star, and delete past analyses

features.name: User Sign Up
features.description: New users can create an account with email and password.
user_flows: Navigate to /signup -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Fill in confirm password -> Submit the registration form -> See account creation confirmation or email check message
Navigate to /signup -> Enter an invalid email format -> See inline validation message
Navigate to /signup -> Enter mismatched passwords -> See inline validation message
Navigate to /signup -> Enter an email that is already registered -> See inline error message

features.name: User Sign In
features.description: Returning users can sign in with email and password to access their analyses.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See the analyses history page
Navigate to /login -> Fill in email -> Fill in password -> Submit the sign-in form -> See an inline authentication error for incorrect credentials
Navigate to /login -> Attempt to access a protected route -> See redirection back to /login

features.name: CSV Upload and Analysis Start
features.description: Authenticated users can upload a CSV file and begin a new analysis session.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> Upload a CSV file -> Review or skip analysis preferences -> Start the analysis -> See upload progress -> See automatic redirection to the session dashboard
Navigate to /history -> Upload a non-CSV file -> See a validation message that only CSV files are accepted
Navigate to /history -> Upload a CSV file larger than the allowed size -> See a validation message that the file exceeds the limit
Navigate to /history -> Upload a CSV file -> See the analysis complete and the session dashboard open automatically

features.name: Analysis History
features.description: Authenticated users can view and manage a list of previous analyses.
user_flows: Navigate to /history -> View the list of past analyses -> Open one analysis to view its dashboard
Navigate to /history -> Search for an analysis by filename or custom label -> See the matching history results
Navigate to /history -> Turn on the starred-only filter -> See only starred analyses
Navigate to /history -> Toggle the star on an analysis -> See the starred state update
Navigate to /history -> Rename an analysis -> Enter a new label -> Save the change -> See the updated name in the list
Navigate to /history -> Delete an analysis -> Confirm permanent deletion -> See the analysis removed from the list

features.name: Session Dashboard and Results Review
features.description: Users can inspect a completed analysis session through tabs that show summary data, charts, insights, forecasting, and chat.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> View the overview summary, charts, insights, forecast, and chat content for a completed session
Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Switch between Overview, Charts, Insights, Forecast, and Chat tabs -> See the selected section update
Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open a session that belongs to another account -> See an access denied message and a link back to analyses

features.name: Dataset Q&A Chat
features.description: Users can ask natural-language questions about the dataset and receive AI-generated answers.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open the Chat tab -> Send a question about the dataset -> See the user message and assistant response
Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open the Chat tab -> Use a suggested question -> See the conversation update with an answer
Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open the Chat tab -> Enter more than the allowed character limit -> See input validation behavior

features.name: Downloads
features.description: Users can download analysis outputs generated from a completed session.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open the download options -> Download the cleaned CSV file
Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open the download options -> Download the Jupyter notebook
Navigate to /dashboard/[sessionId] -> Open the download options -> Download the PDF report

routes.description: Analysis results dashboard for a specific session

features.name: User Login
features.description: Login with email/password or Google OAuth
user_interactions: Click Sign In button to submit
See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: CSV Upload
user_interactions: Drag and drop CSV file onto dropzone
See progress bar for upload and analysis
Get redirected to dashboard automatically upon completion

features.name: Analysis History
features.description: View list of previous data analysis sessions
user_interactions: Click on a session card to navigate to its dashboard

features.name: Session Dashboard
features.description: View analysis results, charts, and AI insights
